title: Age Calculator - Calculate Exact Age
description: Free age calculator. Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days from your date of birth.
keywords: age calculator, date of birth calculator, how old am I, age in days
intro: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Find out how many days you've been alive.

faq.a: Age is calculated by finding the difference between your birth date and today's date, broken down into years, months, and days.

faq.q: Can I calculate age between two dates?
faq.a: Yes, enter any two dates to find the exact time difference between them.
